title: WitcherZ
description: A LevelZ Addon for the Witcher mod.
body:
A LevelZ Addon for the Witcher mod.

This addon adds level requirements for Witcher weapons and armors to fit seemlessly with LevelZ. This way you can add the Witcher mod to your RPG modpacks without worrying about people skipping progression.

Did I miss something or do you have any further suggestions for other mods I should make compatible? Follow the discord link and let me know!
